title: Kwa shop robbed on New Year's Day
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A small business in...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A small business in KwaNonqaba had an unfortunate start to 2026 when the owner and his son were robbed just 30 minutes into the New Year.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A small business in KwaNonqaba had an unfortunate start to 2026 when the owner and his son were robbed just 30 minutes into the New Year."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"KwaNonqaba Police Station spokesperson Warrant Officer Kappie Kapp two suspects, wielding pangas entered a small shop on Mabolo Street at 00:30."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Kapp said the owner sustained minor injuries to his left hand and an undisclosed amount of cash, cigarettes and cellphones were stolen.","html":"Kapp said the owner sustained minor injuries to his left hand and an undisclosed amount of cash, cigarettes and cellphones were stolen."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"One of the suspects, a 31-year-old man, was arrested yesterday afternoon and is expected to appear in the Mossel Bay Magistrate's Court on Monday, 5 January.","html":"One of the suspects, a 31-year-old man, was arrested yesterday afternoon and is expected to appear in the Mossel Bay Magistrate's Court on Monday, 5 January."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The second suspect is still at large.","html":"The second suspect is still at large."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"If you have any information regarding the robbery, contact the investigating officer, Sergeant Vusi Ndala on 044 606 5617.","html":"If you have any information regarding the robbery, contact the investigating officer, Sergeant Vusi Ndala on 044 606 5617."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Kwa shop robbed on New Year's Day
